name: Holiday Chocolate Fruitcake
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Red candied cherries = coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: GARY BRAMMER (BBFT81A)
Heat oven to 300 degrees. Grease and flour 10-inch tube pan. In large mixer bowl, beat cream cheese, butter and sugar until blended. Add eggs, 1 at a time, beating until light and fluffy. Stir together 2 cups flour, cocoa, baking powder and salt; add to cream cheese mixture, alternately with orange juice, beating well. In a small bowl, toss remaining 1/4 cup flour with cherries, raisins and pecans; stir into cocoa mixture with brandy until blended. Bake for 1 hour and 30 to 35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in center comes out clean. Cool for 15 minutes; remove from pan to wire rack. Cool completely. Cover; store in refrigerator. Garnish as desired.
